description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a light wood grain finish on the front and sides, and a slightly darker wood tone on the top and back. The cabinet features two spacious drawers, both of which are partially open, revealing their boxy interiors. Each drawer is equipped with a horizontal, rectangular handle made of a matching wood material, providing a simple and modern aesthetic. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with no visible legs or wheels, giving it a sturdy and stable appearance. The surfaces are smooth and flat, making the top suitable for placing additional items. There are no visible locks or label holders on the drawers, emphasizing a minimalist design.
description: A small, two-drawer wooden filing cabinet with a light and natural wood finish, featuring simple horizontal handles and a smooth, flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing both drawers partially open, revealing the handles and interior space.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wood grain side panel and the open drawers extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with both drawers open and the side panel visible.
